product_code.description: The retailer's unique product identifier linking this item to its parent product.

store_code.description: The retailer's unique store identifier where this item is sold.

price.description: The current selling price of the item at this store.

sale_price.description: The promotional or sale price, if applicable.

sale_start_date.description: The start date of the sale period.

sale_end_date.description: The end date of the sale period.

available.description: Whether the item is currently available for purchase at this store.

inventory_count.description: The current inventory count at this store.

aisle.description: The store aisle where the item is located.

shelf.description: The shelf location within the aisle.
